examples: I guess it was Georgie who got me climbing.
Why, if it isn't old Georgie! How are you after all these years?
Carville paced the floor, waving the letter around and Shouting, Georgie!
Shortly after acquiring the tower at the age of 51, Yeats married Georgie Hyde-Lees, a 25-year-old Englishwoman.
Beryl Bainbridge's novel Master Georgie, which won the WHSmith literary award earlier this year, was dropped from the final shortlist.
